outcome: Tree v1 created with 9 nodes: 3 Earth-side leaves (q1 industrial inputs, q2 atmospheric chemistry, q3 destination reachability as constraint), 4 Moon-side (q4 power, q5 materials, q6 mass-driver throughput, q7 receiver as constraint), 1 cross-cutting leaf (q8 Moon-as-supplier), 1 synthesis (q9 cosmic multiplier). Calibration: cosmic-scale Tt/yr. Earth tech: chemical rockets only. Moon scope: launcher + supplier channels both.

Tree v2 — Avi-driven revisions. Deprecated q4 (lunar power, solar scalable beyond need) and q7 (receiver, payloads self-propel; brief subsection folded into q6). Expanded q3 to propulsion-class × origin × destination matrix (chemical primary; ion / NTR / NPP as future-regime sensitivities; both Earth and Moon launched). Expanded q6 to include N-parallel-driver analysis + brief catcher subsection (Casey Handmer May 2026 as primary anchor). Split original q8 into q8a (Moon propellant → Earth-launched cargo) and q8b (Moon propellant → Moon-launched cargo) for separate-allocation comparison. Updated q9 synthesis dependencies. v1 snapshotted to 01-tree/history/v1.yaml; growth-log.md created.
